source.description: A reviewed six-panel felt-tip marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free ice-cream truck in a simple three-quarter side view on warm paper, with no words, prices, logos, people, brand mascots, sticker outline, badge frame, or street scene.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one boxy truck, cab angle, wheel centers, and serving-window footprint, wraps the vehicle silhouette, adds the cab and service features without drawing hidden siding, introduces a small cone symbol and motion accents, then inks and colors every established shape before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: truck box, cab wedge, two wheel circles, serving-window reserve, and ground axis
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes a compact three-quarter truck, two aligned wheels, the cab angle, and a large blank service-window footprint in the cargo side.

final_elements.name: ice-cream-truck silhouette with cab, cargo body, wheel arches, two tires, and bumpers
final_elements.description: A chunky outer contour turns the guides into a readable small truck while keeping the two wheels aligned.

final_elements.name: windshield, side window, headlight, serving window, striped awning, and serving shelf
final_elements.description: The cab glazing, light, large open service window, awning, and shelf establish the truck's function without lettering.

final_elements.name: small cone symbol, door seam and handle, hubcaps, body stripes, motion arcs, and road shadow
final_elements.description: A simple no-text cone symbol and a few vehicle details, stripes, motion arcs, and a shallow road shadow add playful specificity.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with turquoise, raspberry, yellow, orange, and pale blue marker fills
final_elements.description: Bold marker reinforces all established forms while bright fills separate the truck body, awning, wheels, cone symbol, windows, and motion accents.

frames.visible_job: Places the boxy cargo body, cab wedge, two wheel circles, serving-window reserve, and ground axis at one fixed scale.
introduces: truck box, cab wedge, two wheel circles, serving-window reserve, and ground axis

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the cab, cargo body, wheel arches, two tires, and simple front and rear bumpers.
introduces: ice-cream-truck silhouette with cab, cargo body, wheel arches, two tires, and bumpers
requires_prior_elements: truck box, cab wedge, two wheel circles, serving-window reserve, and ground axis

frames.visible_job: Adds the windshield, side window, headlight, large serving window, striped awning, and shelf inside the reserved footprints.
introduces: windshield, side window, headlight, serving window, striped awning, and serving shelf
requires_prior_elements: truck box, cab wedge, two wheel circles, serving-window reserve, and ground axis
ice-cream-truck silhouette with cab, cargo body, wheel arches, two tires, and bumpers

frames.visible_job: Adds a small no-text cone symbol, door seam and handle, hubcaps, body stripes, two motion arcs, and a shallow road shadow.
introduces: small cone symbol, door seam and handle, hubcaps, body stripes, motion arcs, and road shadow
requires_prior_elements: ice-cream-truck silhouette with cab, cargo body, wheel arches, two tires, and bumpers
windshield, side window, headlight, serving window, striped awning, and serving shelf

frames.step_name: Ink and color the ice-cream truck
frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the truck, awning, windows, cone symbol, wheels, stripes, and motion accents with visible marker texture.
introduces: thick black outline with turquoise, raspberry, yellow, orange, and pale blue marker fills
requires_prior_elements: ice-cream-truck silhouette with cab, cargo body, wheel arches, two tires, and bumpers
windshield, side window, headlight, serving window, striped awning, and serving shelf
small cone symbol, door seam and handle, hubcaps, body stripes, motion arcs, and road shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established truck contours, service features, wheels, symbol, stripes, motion arcs, marker fills, highlight gaps, and road shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on established glass, metal, and painted shapes

rejection_checks: No body plane, cab, wheel, bumper, window, awning, shelf, headlight, cone symbol, door detail, stripe, motion arc, color area, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The truck must retain one three-quarter side view, wheel spacing, service-window placement, scale, and crop across every frame.
Reserve the service-window footprint from step one; do not finish hidden siding or stripes beneath the open window and awning.
Reject text, prices, logos, brand characters, faces, people, extra vehicles, street scenes, sticker outlines, badge frames, or decorative borders.
Reject glossy vector icon art, airbrushed poster rendering, smooth digital gradients, or mechanically perfect geometry.
